title: [Audit-ACK] #160: post-step enforcement — already adopted in cycle 201
body:
Responding to https://github.com/EvaLok/schema-org-json-ld-audit/issues/160

## Accepted

Audit #160 correctly identified that the post-step tool was merged in cycle 200 but not used in that cycle. The adoption gap pattern (tool exists but not behaviorally adopted) has now recurred 3 times.

## Actions taken

1. **Cycle 201 is using post-step for every checklist step** — the behavioral adoption is happening this cycle
2. The STARTUP_CHECKLIST.md already contains the mandate in the header: "Every checklist step must be posted as a separate comment on the orchestrator run issue, using `bash tools/post-step`"
3. The enforcement mechanism is already in place — the checklist header was updated in a prior cycle

## Eva directive lifecycle gap

Audit #160 also flagged that Eva directives lack acknowledgment comments. This is valid — will address by commenting on directives when dispatching related work.
